file_name: Opal Healthcare Sunnymeade Park - Questionnaire - 20 January 2026.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the competitive impact of the Acquisition on the supply of residential aged care services. Are Opal Healthcare facilities and Sunnymeade Park close competitors and what alternatives are available?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation (if relevant), and relationship with Opal Healthcare and/or Sunnymeade Park.
